market_pulse: Memorial Day weekend surge across all venues; LIV Beach executing strong talent rotation (Discolines/David Guetta/John Summit), while competitors emphasize tech-house and R&B crossovers for broader appeal.

weekend_readiness.label: HIGH
factors: MDW + summer pool season peak traffic expected
LIV Beach strong lineup (Discolines 5/22, David Guetta 5/23, John Summit 5/24)
Competitor intensity: Encore Beach (Calvin Harris 5/23), Zouk (Swae Lee 5/22, RL Grime 5/23)
No major format innovations detected across competitors
LIV storytelling & social engagement could increase volume
weekend_readiness.liv_recommendation: Amplify behind-the-scenes content from David Guetta night; capture crowd energy for Stories; feature John Summit fan interactions; test countdown/countdown stickers for weekend events.

content_gaps.description: Hakkasan executing "R&Bae Wednesdays" and MDW R&B lineup; OMNIA running Latin Sundays; competitors leveraging hip-hop/R&B crossover to expand demographics beyond traditional EDM.
content_gaps.suggested_action: LIV Beach could test weekend R&B/hip-hop guest DJ slot or Latin-themed event to capture same audience crossover without cannibalizing main lineup.

content_gaps.description: XS, Encore Beach, and Zouk emphasizing production/VIP experience behind-the-scenes; minimal BTS content from LIV on social.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Create consistent BTS series: talent arrival, sound check, VIP prep, crowd moments. Post to TikTok/Reels mid-week for organic reach.

content_gaps.description: Promoters (e.g., @livlvguestlist, @normanjay_lasvegas) generating high engagement; LIV's official channels could curate/repost UGC more aggressively.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Create dedicated UGC hashtag campaign for LIV Beach summer; incentivize reposting best clips; feature fan content weekly.

influencer_activity.mention: Edwin Griffiths managing guest list promotions for both LIV Nightclub and LIV Beach; posting event details, promo codes, and bottle service offers; high engagement with follower base.
XS/Encore promoter with 180K followers; using TikTok (normanjay_vegas) to drive VIP table bookings and guest list traffic; competing directly for LIV audience.
Mentioned in LIV Beach posts as performer; engaged audience tracking his Vegas appearances; posting outfit inspiration, pool party content.
